signals.headline: ETH Hits $6K on Apr 18 Amid Pectra Upgrade Final Testing & Record ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**[4]
signals.raw:
ETH Hits $6K on Apr 18 Amid Pectra Upgrade Final Testing & Record ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**[4]

Ethereum price surged to $6K as of April 18, 2026, driven by massive institutional demand, Spot ETH ETF inflows at all-time highs, and the Pectra (Prague-Electra) Upgrade entering final testing—enhancing wallet abstraction, validator efficiency, and Layer 2 TVL milestones on Base/Arbitrum[4]
